summary: Upgrade to Reality modal feature testing complete. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend modal appears correctly when clicking checkmark button on ISO item. Modal contains all required elements: Media Condition dropdown, Sleeve Condition dropdown, Price Paid input, and 'Bring to Reality' button. Honey-themed grade options display correctly in dropdowns.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: The acquire endpoint stores media_condition, sleeve_condition, and price_paid in MongoDB but the RecordResponse model doesn't expose these fields. The data is stored in the 'notes' field as text instead. This is acceptable for MVP but could be enhanced later to have dedicated fields in the API response.
seed_data_creation: Test ISO items created and cleaned up automatically during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Upgrade to Reality feature fully tested. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/iso/{id}/acquire - accepts media_condition, sleeve_condition, price_paid and moves ISO to collection, (2) POST /api/iso/{id}/convert-to-collection - old endpoint still works (backwards compat). Frontend: clicking checkmark on ISO item opens modal with data-testids: acquire-media-condition, acquire-sleeve-condition, acquire-price-paid, acquire-confirm-btn, mark-found-{iso_id}. Honey-themed grade options verified: NM-Queen's Choice, VG+-The Sweet Spot, VG-Hive Classic, G+-Well-Worn Honeycomb, F-Sticky Situation.

POST /api/iso/{id}/acquire removes ISO from list after conversion - PASSED
Old convert endpoint uses default notes - PASSED
All honey-themed grade options (NM, VG+, VG, G+, F) work in acquire - PASSED
